summary: Decompiled nine fighter functions across Crazy Hand, Popo/Ice Climbers specials, and common fighter camera code. The PR also added supporting Popo type fields, a Popo header prototype address comment, and Crazy Hand extern/include support. PR body and bot report both claim all nine functions reached 100% objdiff matches with no ninja diff regressions.

key_files.role: Replaced three function stubs with matched Crazy Hand animation/grab implementations and added supporting include/extern float declarations.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists three ftCh_Init 100% matches

key_files.role: Replaced five Popo special function stubs with implementations for SpecialHi IASA and SpecialLw enter/anim paths.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftPp_SpecialHiStart_0_IASA, ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_0_IASA, ftPp_SpecialLw_Enter, ftPp_SpecialLw_Anim, ftPp_SpecialAirLw_Anim implementations
text_corpus: bot report lists five ftPp_SpecialS function 100% matches

key_files.role: Added typed Popo/Ice Climbers data fields used by the new special move implementations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftIceClimberAttributes x80 and ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw fields

key_files.role: Updated fn_80122D2C declaration from placeholder comment to address-commented prototype.
Replaced ftCo_Rebirth_Cam stub with matched common fighter camera implementation.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists ftCo_Rebirth_Cam 100% match

what_changed: Decompiled Crazy Hand functions: ftCh_TagRockPaper_Anim, ftCh_Slam_Anim, and ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015B670.
Decompiled common fighter function ftCo_Rebirth_Cam in ft_0D31.c.
Decompiled Popo/Ice Climbers functions: ftPp_SpecialHiStart_0_IASA, ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_0_IASA, ftPp_SpecialLw_Enter, ftPp_SpecialLw_Anim, and ftPp_SpecialAirLw_Anim.
Added ftCo_Attack100 include and four Crazy Hand float externs used by new motion-state calls.
Added ftIceClimberAttributes.x80 and ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw fields to support typed access in Popo special code.
Updated ftPp_SpecialS.h with an address-commented prototype for fn_80122D2C.
smart_moves: Used typed Popo motion variable and attribute fields instead of raw offset access for new SpecialLw and SpecialHi logic.
Kept unsupported semantics conservative: fn_80122D2C remains address-style while gaining a concrete prototype/address comment.

Used project/common helper calls such as GET_FIGHTER, ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining, Fighter_ChangeMotionState, ftCommon_UpdateFacing, ftPartSetRotY, and ftPartSetRotX rather than expanded low-level sequences.
Ground and air variants in Popo SpecialHi IASA and SpecialLw Anim were implemented as close sibling shapes with only the terminal action differing where shown by the diff.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function match exposes repeated offset use in fighter move data, adding the narrow owning type or union arm can make the implementation more reviewable and still match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftIceClimberAttributes.x80 added and used as da->x80
raw_diff: ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw.x0 and x4_b0 added and used in ftPp_SpecialLw_Enter

decomp_lessons.lesson: For closely related ground/air fighter state handlers, try the same source shape first and isolate only the behavior that differs, such as returning to ground wait/fall behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftPp_SpecialHiStart_0_IASA and ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_0_IASA have identical bodies
raw_diff: ftPp_SpecialLw_Anim and ftPp_SpecialAirLw_Anim share cleanup body but call ft_8008A2BC vs ftCo_Fall_Enter

decomp_lessons.lesson: Address-style names can remain appropriate when semantics are not established, while still improving header truthfulness with a recovered prototype.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80122D2C remains address-style in ftPp_SpecialS.h

naming_conventions.convention: Use short role locals for common fighter objects where roles are clear, such as fp, gobj, da, and camera_box.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Fighter* fp, ftIceClimberAttributes* da, CmSubject* camera_box

naming_conventions.convention: Keep address-style function names for unclear functions instead of inventing semantic names.
Offset-derived type fields used in this PR retain xNN-style names when precise semantics are not proven.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in four Popo functions, with PR/body and bot evidence claiming successful builds, no diff regressions, and 100% matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(16) in SpecialHiStart IASA functions
raw_diff: PAD_STACK(16) in SpecialLw Anim functions
human_pr_text: ninja builds successfully, ninja diff no regressions, all functions 100% objdiff
text_corpus: bot report lists 9 new 100% matches
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: PAD_STACK is a matching tactic requiring explicit verifier evidence; this PR provides claimed and bot-reported match/regression evidence but no inline discussion of why the padding was necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used ABS macro for stick threshold checks in Popo SpecialHi IASA handlers.
Used a pointer reinterpretation for ftCo_Rebirth_Cam camera Y source: *(f32*) &fp->mv.co.common.x8 + spC.x0.x.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence shows this matched, but does not explain the underlying type or whether a future type cleanup is possible.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used typed bitfield x4_b0 in Popo speciallw motion vars for a flag at fp+2344:0.

follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for cleanup or removal of PAD_STACK in ftPp_SpecialS.c.
Search for later semantic naming of ftIceClimberAttributes.x80 or ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw fields.
Search for later type cleanup around ftCo_Rebirth_Cam and fp->mv.co.common.x8 reinterpret cast.
Search for later rename or documentation of fn_80122D2C.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number/title/author/state/merged_at and changed file counts
raw_diff: full diff excerpt for all five changed files
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report with 9 new 100% matches and +1188 matched bytes
notes: No review comments are present in the loaded slice, so reviewer feedback cannot be inferred.
The PR body claims local ninja, ninja diff, and objdiff success; the bot report independently lists 9 new 100% matches and one .sdata2 improvement.
The evidence does not include detailed author reasoning for PAD_STACK usage, the ftCo_Rebirth_Cam cast, or field semantics beyond the changed code.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use narrow typed fighter fields when a match exposes move/attribute offsets
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2280 shows Popo special handlers matching with newly added ftIceClimberAttributes.x80 and ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw fields instead of raw offsets. This is consistent with typed-fields-over-pointer-math, but the field semantics remain offset-style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PAD_STACK can appear in matched fighter source only with narrow match evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2280 used PAD_STACK in Popo SpecialHi/SpecialLw handlers, and the PR/body plus bot report claim successful build, no regressions, and 100% matches. The slice does not explain why padding was necessary, so this should remain a narrow PR example, not a general style preference.

source_update_candidates.title: ftPopo/types.h gained fields used by ftPp_SpecialS matches in PR #2280
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2280 added ftIceClimberAttributes.x80 and ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw fields for Popo/Ice Climbers special move decompilation. Field names remain offset-style and should not be treated as semantic beyond the source evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for future Popo/Ice Climbers decomp work; should be curator-reviewed rather than promoted from intake.

source_update_candidates.title: ft_0D31.c contains matched ftCo_Rebirth_Cam from PR #2280
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2280 decompiled ftCo_Rebirth_Cam in src/melee/ft/ft_0D31.c; bot report lists it as a 128-byte 100% match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report row for ftCo_Rebirth_Cam
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential file/symbol path fact for curator indexing.

rejection_notes: Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; no reviews or review comments are loaded.
Do not generalize PAD_STACK as preferred style; existing standards require explicit evidence and this slice only supports narrow use in the changed Popo functions.
Do not assign semantic names to x80, speciallw.x0, x4_b0, or fn_80122D2C from this PR alone.
Do not claim data-section ownership work beyond the bot-reported .sdata2 improvement; the diff does not show explicit data/split edits.
